tagline: Radiance, reimagined - physician-led aesthetics in Santa Rosa
seoDescription: Morpheus Medical Aesthetics is a physician-owned med spa in Santa Rosa, CA, led by board-certified family physician Dr. Marisha Chilcott. Botox, dermal fillers, laser resurfacing, microneedling, HydraFacial, and medical weight loss since 2009. Call (707) 921-7447.
heroHeading: Refined, natural results from a physician-owned med spa
heroSubheading: Since 2009, Dr. Marisha Chilcott and her team have helped Santa Rosa and Marin clients age gracefully with Botox, fillers, laser, and advanced skin treatments - delivered with artistry and genuine care.
highlights: Physician-owned and operated, led by Dr. Marisha Chilcott, a Board Certified Family Physician and Fellow of the California Academy of Cosmetic Surgeons
Established in 2009 and grown largely by word of mouth for consistently natural-looking results
Rated 4.9 stars on Google across 139+ reviews
Two convenient locations: Santa Rosa (2800 Cleveland Ave) and Sausalito/Marin
Full menu of injectables, lasers, and skin treatments - Botox, Daxxify, Dysport, Juvederm, RHA, Restylane, Sculptra, CO2RE, microneedling, and more
Dr. Chilcott trains other physicians and nurses in cosmetic injection technique and speaks on emerging aesthetic technologies
aboutHeading: Medical aesthetics, led by a physician who treats the face as her medium
aboutBody: Founded in 2009, Morpheus Medical Aesthetics is a physician-owned and operated med spa serving Santa Rosa and Marin, California. The practice is led by Dr. Marisha Chilcott, a Board Certified Family Physician and Fellow of the California Academy of Cosmetic Surgeons who approaches aesthetic medicine as an art - considering the human face as her medium and tailoring every treatment to a client's individual needs, goals, and lifestyle.

Dr. Chilcott's roots are firmly in medicine. Alongside her aesthetics work she has continued to serve as a primary care physician for adults with developmental disabilities and works as an occasional hospitalist at Petaluma Valley Hospital. She is also a trainer of physicians and nurses in cosmetic injection techniques and a sought-after speaker on emerging aesthetic technologies - experience that shapes the standard of care across her team.

The practice has grown primarily by word of mouth, built on consistently natural results and a commitment to long-term relationships. Clients consistently praise the warm, down-to-earth team - naming providers like Julie, Cherlyn, Shannon, and Angelica - for taking the time to explain treatments and outcomes. With a 4.9-star rating across more than 139 Google reviews, Morpheus pairs medical expertise with an artistic, unhurried approach to looking like the best version of yourself.

services.title: Botox & Wrinkle Relaxers
services.description: Smooth fine lines and wrinkles with physician-administered neuromodulators including Botox, Daxxify, Dysport, Jeuveau, and Xeomin for natural, refreshed results.

services.title: Dermal Fillers & Facial Contouring
services.description: Restore volume and definition with Juvederm, Restylane, RHA, Voluma, Sculptra, and Kybella - plus liquid facelift and PRF treatments tailored to your face.

services.title: Laser & Skin Resurfacing
services.description: Improve tone, texture, and sun damage with CO2RE laser resurfacing, Clear + Brilliant, and Nordlys/SRA treatments for clearer, smoother skin.

services.title: Microneedling & RF Microneedling
services.description: Stimulate collagen and tighten skin with traditional microneedling, RF microneedling (Matrix Pro), and Profound for firmer, rejuvenated results.

services.title: Facials & Skincare
services.description: Glow with HydraFacial, DiamondGlow, dermaplaning, chemical peels, and prescription medical-grade skincare suited to your concerns.

services.title: Medical Weight Loss & Wellness
services.description: Semaglutide medical weight loss, IV therapy, B12 shots, hormone (HRT) consultations, and PRF hair restoration to support how you look and feel.

testimonials.quote: I have been having facial treatments in several cities across the United States and by far Dr. Chilcott is the best!
testimonials.author: Ellen O.

notes:
CONFIRMED: This is the correct business. Phone (707) 921-7447 and address 2800 Cleveland Ave, Santa Rosa CA 95403 match across the official site, Yelp, and aggregators. The known website (morpheusmedspa.com) is LIVE, not dead.

SOURCES:
- Official site: https://www.morpheusmedspa.com/ , /about/about-us/ , /resources/pricing/ , /contact/ , /contact/locations/
- Yelp: https://www.yelp.com/biz/morpheus-medical-aesthetics-santa-rosa-2 (84 photos, 104 reviews; page returned HTTP 403 on direct fetch so exact Yelp star rating not captured)
- TrustAnalytica: https://trustanalytica.org/us/ca/santa-rosa/reviews/morpheus-medical-aesthetics (4.9 stars)
- Sausalito/Marin sister location Yelp: https://www.yelp.com/biz/morpheus-medical-aesthetics-sausalito

VERIFIED FACTS: Founded 2009; physician-owned; Dr. Marisha Chilcott (Board Certified Family Physician, Fellow California Academy of Cosmetic Surgeons); two locations (Santa Rosa + Salons by JC Suite 20, 190 Donahue St, Sausalito CA 94965, phone 415-924-1330); full service menu with real pricing pulled from the official pricing page.

RATING: Used 4.9 / 139 reviews as stated on the official site's contact page (Google). TrustAnalytica also shows 4.9 (count varies: 72 listed there). Yelp shows 104 reviews but exact Yelp star value could not be fetched (403). Rating value is well-corroborated; the 139 count is from the business's own site citing Google.

CAVEATS / UNVERIFIED:
- ADDRESS SUITE DISCREPANCY: The official site currently lists "Suite D" on contact/locations/home pages, while Yelp, Fresha, and aggregators list "Suite A." The provided task data said "2800 Cleveland Ave" (no suite). Recommend confirming current suite with the business; I left the suite out of the structured address fields and noted both here.
- HOURS DISCREPANCY: Aggregator/about data shows Tue-Fri 8:00 AM-7:00 PM (Mon/Sat/Sun closed); the official locations page showed "Tuesday-Friday 9am-7pm" for Santa Rosa. I used 8 AM-7 PM (the more commonly cited figure) but the official page suggests possibly 9 AM open. Verify with business.
- TESTIMONIAL: The Ellen O. quote is from the official About page (a self-published testimonial), not an independent platform. Staff-name praise (Julie, Cherlyn, Shannon, Angelica) is paraphrased from search-result summaries of Yelp/aggregator reviews, NOT verbatim - so I did not include those as direct quotes.
- PHOTOS: Could NOT extract any direct image URLs that are clearly theirs. The homepage uses dynamic loading / SVG placeholders; only the logo PNG was exposed (excluded per instructions). Yelp has 84 photos but the page is 403-blocked. realPhotoUrls left empty rather than risk linking logos/stock.
- Botox priced at $18/unit (Dysport/Jeuveau/Xeomin $15/unit); Yelp menu also referenced a Botox/Dysport injection starting around $280 per session. priceRange ($$-$$$) is an estimate based on the pricing page.
- Semaglutide weight loss is referenced in search summaries; pricing page lists IV therapy, B12, HRT, hair restoration. Listed Semaglutide under wellness as it appears in their marketing.
